'''Loa Tibeeme''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] who had been caught by [[Naescorcom/Legends|Naescorcom]] after [[Gender/Legends|she]] had infiltrated their systems. Instead of turning her over for prosecution, they offered her a chance to work for them, in a sort of indentured servitude. Naescorcom had been having problems with slicers, so wanted a skilled one on their side. As part of her work, Loa helped set up the security measures in the [[Computer/Legends|computer]] systems of [[Ipsus]]. She was not happy about the situation, and left backdoors in the systems she worked on so that she could gain her revenge later.

{{Char-stub}}
